description: Style Note Let only transform your everyday attire to fun, colourful and stylish! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these flattering tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and trendy when you're wearing anything from this summery collection. Product Details Pink waistcoat with sequin detail in the front, has a single hook closure in the front, V neckline, an adjustable buckle detail at the lower back and tapering hemline Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash separately Turn inside out before washing or ironing Do not bleach or tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
